query: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name LIKE '%source%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AnaPRc1Kpw1Jvjc.659756d42373 --database 6acGApiU8Bjnxuzxb5vkwU --execute SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name LIKE '%source%';
